```js
1→import {
     2→  createUserWithEmailAndPassword,
     3→  signInWithEmailAndPassword,
     4→  signOut,
     5→  onAuthStateChanged,
     6→  updateProfile
     7→} from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.14.1/firebase-auth.js";
     8→import { setDoc, doc, serverTimestamp } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.14.1/firebase-firestore.js";
     9→import { auth, db } from "./firebase-config.js";
    10→
    11→// --- Tab switching ---
    12→const loginTab = document.getElementById("login-tab");
    13→const signupTab = document.getElementById("signup-tab");
    14→const loginForm = document.getElementById("login-form");
    15→const signupForm = document.getElementById("signup-form");
    16→
    17→loginTab.addEventListener("click", () => {
    18→  loginTab.classList.add("active");
    19→  signupTab.classList.remove("active");
    20→  loginForm.classList.remove("hidden");
    21→  signupForm.classList.add("hidden");
    22→  // Disable hidden form inputs so browser validation ignores them
    23→  signupForm.querySelectorAll("input").forEach(i => i.disabled = true);
    24→  loginForm.querySelectorAll("input").forEach(i => i.disabled = false);
    25→  clearError();
    26→});
    27→
    28→signupTab.addEventListener("click", () => {
    29→  signupTab.classList.add("active");
    30→  loginTab.classList.remove("active");
    31→  signupForm.classList.remove("hidden");
    32→  loginForm.classList.add("hidden");
    33→  loginForm.querySelectorAll("input").forEach(i => i.disabled = true);
    34→  signupForm.querySelectorAll("input").forEach(i => i.disabled = false);
    35→  clearError();
    36→});
    37→
    38→// Flag to prevent onAuthStateChanged from racing with form submission redirects
    39→let isSubmitting = false;
    40→
    41→// --- Sign Up ---
    42→signupForm.addEventListener("submit", async (e) => {
    43→  e.preventDefault();
    44→  isSubmitting = true;
    45→
    46→  const submitBtn = signupForm.querySelector(".submit-btn");
    47→  submitBtn.disabled = true;
    48→  submitBtn.textContent = "Creating account...";
    49→
    50→  const displayName = document.getElementById("signup-name").value.trim();
    51→  const email = document.getElementById("signup-email").value.trim();
    52→  const password = document.getElementById("signup-password").value;
    53→
    54→  let user = null;
    55→  try {
    56→    ({ user } = await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(auth, email, password));
    57→    await updateProfile(user, { displayName });
    58→    await setDoc(doc(db, "users", user.uid), {
    59→      uid: user.uid,
    60→      displayName,
    61→      displayNameLower: displayName.toLowerCase(),
    62→      email,
    63→      createdAt: serverTimestamp()
    64→    });
    65→    window.location.href = "profile.html";
    66→  } catch (err) {
    67→    // If Auth user was created but a later step failed, delete the partial account
    68→    if (user) await user.delete().catch(() => {});
    69→    isSubmitting = false;
    70→    submitBtn.disabled = false;
    71→    submitBtn.textContent = "Create Account";
    72→    showError(friendlyError(err.code));
    73→  }
    74→});
    75→
    76→// --- Log In ---
    77→loginForm.addEventListener("submit", async (e) => {
    78→  e.preventDefault();
    79→  isSubmitting = true;
    80→  const email = document.getElementById("login-email").value.trim();
    81→  const password = document.getElementById("login-password").value;
    82→
    83→  try {
    84→    await signInWithEmailAndPassword(auth, email, password);
    85→    window.location.href = "profile.html";
    86→  } catch (err) {
    87→    isSubmitting = false;
    88→    showError(friendlyError(err.code));
    89→  }
    90→});
    91→
    92→// --- Redirect if already logged in ---
    93→// Only fires when the page loads with an existing session, not during form submissions
    94→onAuthStateChanged(auth, (user) => {
    95→  if (user && !isSubmitting) window.location.href = "profile.html";
    96→});
    97→
    98→// --- Helpers ---
    99→function showError(message) {
   100→  const el = document.getElementById("auth-error");
… (truncated — 123 lines total)
```

1→<!DOCTYPE html>

Good, I now have a complete picture of every file. Here's what I'll do in one pass:

3. **`home.html`** + **`js/home.js`** — new dashboard page

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 4:10:06 PM)*

**✏️ Write `C:/Users/brock/OneDrive/Desktop/dig4503/midterm/css/reviews.css`**
```css
*, *::before, *::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
}

body {
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #060c14 0%, #0a1929 100%);
  background-attachment: fixed;
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #e0f7f7;
  padding: 5rem 1rem 2.5rem;
}

/* ── Nav ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.top-nav {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  z-index: 50;
  height: 3.5rem;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0 1.5rem;
  background: rgba(6, 12, 20, 0.92);
  backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.1);
}

.nav-logo {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #3dd6c8;
  text-decoration: none;
  letter-spacing: -0.3px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.nav-links {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.nav-links a {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #7fc8c4;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: color 0.15s;
}

.nav-links a:hover {
  color: #3dd6c8;
}

/* ── Card ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.card {
  background: #0d1f35;
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.18);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 2rem;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 560px;
}

.card h1 {
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  color: #3dd6c8;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  letter-spacing: -0.5px;
}

/* ── Type toggle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.type-toggle {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

.type-btn {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 0.55rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.2);
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: #7fc8c4;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
}

.type-btn.active {
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.12);
  border-color: #3dd6c8;
  color: #3dd6c8;
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* ── Form fields ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.form-group {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.3rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.1rem;
}

label {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: #5eead4;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}

input, textarea {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.65rem 0.85rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.2);
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: #e0f7f7;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-family: inherit;
  outline: none;
  transition: border-color 0.2s;
  resize: vertical;
}

input:focus, textarea:focus {
  border-color: #3dd6c8;
}

/* ── Star rating ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.star-group {
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

.stars {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  margin-top: 0.3rem;
}

.star {
  background: none;
  border: none;
  font-size: 2rem;
  color: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.2);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: color 0.15s, transform 0.1s;
  padding: 0;
  line-height: 1;
}

.star.selected,
.star.hovered {
  color: #3dd6c8;
}

.star:hover {
  transform: scale(1.15);
}

/* ── Buttons ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.submit-btn {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.75rem;
  background: #3dd6c8;
  color: #060c14;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1rem;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
  transition: background 0.2s;
}

.submit-btn:hover {
  background: #5eead4;
}

.submit-btn:disabled {
  opacity: 0.6;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

/* ── Status messages ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.status-msg {
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  min-height: 1.2rem;
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.status-msg.success,
.status.success { color: #4ade80; }

.status-msg.error,
.status.error   { color: #f87171; }

.status {
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  min-height: 1.2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

/* ── Search ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.search-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.search-row input {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
}

.search-btn {
  width: auto;
  white-space: nowrap;
  padding: 0.65rem 1.25rem;
  margin-top: 0;
}

/* ── User cards (search results, follows) ────────────────────────────────────── */

.user-card {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.12);
  border-radius: 10px;
  text-decoration: none;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
}

.user-card:hover {
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.07);
  border-color: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.3);
}

.user-name {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #e0f7f7;
}

.user-arrow {
  color: #3dd6c8;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
}

/* ── Public profile ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.public-profile-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

.public-profile-header h1 {
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

.profile-subtext {
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  color: #5eead4;
}

.follow-btn {
  padding: 0.55rem 1.25rem;
  background: transparent;
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.35);
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: #3dd6c8;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.follow-btn:hover:not(:disabled) {
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.1);
  border-color: #3dd6c8;
}

.follow-btn:disabled {
  opacity: 0.4;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

.follow-btn.following {
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.12);
  border-color: #3dd6c8;
}

.divider {
  border: none;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.12);
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

.section-heading {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #5eead4;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

/* ── Review list ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.reviews-list {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.85rem;
}

.review-card {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.12);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem;
  transition: border-color 0.2s;
}

.review-card:hover {
  border-color: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.25);
}

.review-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.review-title {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #f0fffe;
}

.review-artist {
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  color: #5eead4;
  margin-top: 0.1rem;
}

.review-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: flex-end;
  gap: 0.25rem;
}

.review-stars {
  color: #3dd6c8;
  font-size: 1rem;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.type-badge {
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em;
  color: #060c14;
  background: #3dd6c8;
  padding: 0.15rem 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 99px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.review-text {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #a7d8d4;
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
}

.review-footer {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
}

.review-date {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #5eead4;
}

.review-author {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #3dd6c8;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
}

.review-author:hover {
  opacity: 0.75;
}

.delete-btn {
  background: none;
  border: none;
  color: #f87171;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
}

.delete-btn:hover {
  opacity: 0.75;
}

.delete-btn:disabled {
  opacity: 0.5;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

/* ── Review actions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.review-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  align-items: center;
}

.write-review-btn,
.add-to-list-btn {
  background: none;
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.3);
  color: #3dd6c8;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 0.2rem 0.55rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.write-review-btn:hover,
.add-to-list-btn:hover {
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.08);
}

/* ── Modal ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.modal-overlay {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.65);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  z-index: 100;
  padding: 1rem;
}

.modal-overlay[hidden] {
  display: none;
}

.modal {
  background: #0d1f35;
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.22);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 360px;
  max-height: 80vh;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

.modal-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

.modal-title {
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  color: #3dd6c8;
}

.modal-close {
  background: none;
  border: none;
  color: #5eead4;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0;
  line-height: 1;
  transition: color 0.2s;
}

.modal-close:hover {
  color: #e0f7f7;
}

.modal-list-btn {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  text-align: left;
  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.12);
  border-radius: 8px;
  color: #e0f7f7;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
}

.modal-list-btn:last-child {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.modal-list-btn:hover:not(:disabled) {
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.08);
  border-color: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.3);
}

.modal-list-btn:disabled {
  opacity: 0.6;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

.modal-loading,
.modal-empty {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #5eead4;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 1rem 0;
}

.modal-new-btn {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 0.6rem;
  background: none;
  border: 1px dashed rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.25);
  border-radius: 8px;
  color: #5eead4;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
}

.modal-new-btn:hover {
  border-color: #3dd6c8;
  color: #3dd6c8;
}

.modal-create-form {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
}

.modal-create-form input {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 0.55rem 0.75rem;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  width: auto;
}

.modal-create-btn {
  padding: 0.55rem 0.9rem;
  background: #3dd6c8;
  color: #060c14;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
  white-space: nowrap;
  transition: background 0.2s;
}

.modal-create-btn:hover {
  background: #5eead4;
}

.modal-create-btn:disabled {
  opacity: 0.6;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

/* ── List detail ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.list-detail-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

.list-detail-header h1 {
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

.list-detail-desc {
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  color: #5eead4;
}

.back-link {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #5eead4;
  text-decoration: none;
  white-space: nowrap;
  transition: color 0.2s;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.back-link:hover {
  color: #3dd6c8;
}

/* ── Lists ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.optional-label {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #5eead4;
  text-transform: none;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  font-weight: 400;
}

.list-card {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.12);
  border-radius: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
}

a.list-card:hover {
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.07);
  border-color: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.3);
}

.list-card-body {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
}

.list-name-link {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #3dd6c8;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: block;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
}

.list-name-link:hover {
  opacity: 0.75;
}

.list-desc {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #5eead4;
  margin-top: 0.2rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

.list-card-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: flex-end;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.list-count {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #5eead4;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* ── Profile ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.stats-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.75rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.stat {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.15rem;
}

.stat-value {
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #3dd6c8;
}

.stat-label {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: #5eead4;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

.stat-link {
  text-decoration: none;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 0.25rem 0.4rem;
  margin: -0.25rem -0.4rem;
  transition: background 0.2s;
}

.stat-link:hover {
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.08);
}

.user-info {
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.info-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.2rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.85rem;
}

.info-label {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #5eead4;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

.info-value {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: #e0f7f7;
}

.edit-section {
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.12);
  padding-top: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.edit-section h2 {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #5eead4;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.edit-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  align-items: center;
}

.edit-row input {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
}

.save-btn {
  padding: 0.65rem 1.1rem;
  background: #3dd6c8;
  color: #060c14;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.save-btn:hover {
  background: #5eead4;
}

.save-btn:disabled {
  opacity: 0.6;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

.logout-btn {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.7rem;
  background: transparent;
  color: #f87171;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  border: 1px solid rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.35);
  border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
}

.logout-btn:hover {
  background: rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.08);
  border-color: #f87171;
}

/* ── Home dashboard ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.home-welcome {
  margin-bottom: 1.75rem;
}

.home-welcome h1 {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.home-welcome h1 span {
  color: #3dd6c8;
}

.home-stats {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 0.65rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

.home-stat {
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.04);
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.14);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 0.85rem 0.75rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.2rem;
  transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
}

.home-stat:hover {
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.09);
  border-color: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.3);
}

.home-stat .stat-value {
  font-size: 1.4rem;
}

.home-stat .stat-label {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
}

.home-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.action-btn {
  flex: 1;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 0.65rem 1rem;
  background: #3dd6c8;
  color: #060c14;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  border-radius: 6px;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.2s;
}

.action-btn:hover {
  background: #5eead4;
}

.action-btn-ghost {
  background: transparent;
  color: #3dd6c8;
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.35);
}

.action-btn-ghost:hover {
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.07);
}

.feed-more {
  display: block;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #5eead4;
  text-decoration: none;
  margin-top: 1.25rem;
  transition: color 0.2s;
}

.feed-more:hover {
  color: #3dd6c8;
}

/* ── Empty state ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.empty-state {
  text-align: center;
  color: #5eead4;
  padding: 2rem 0;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

/* ── Responsive ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

@media (max-width: 600px) {
  .top-nav {
    padding: 0 1rem;
  }

  .nav-links {
    gap: 0.75rem;
  }

  .nav-links a {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 480px) {
  body {
    padding: 4.5rem 0.75rem 2rem;
  }

  .card {
    padding: 1.5rem 1.25rem;
  }

  .card h1 {
    font-size: 1.4rem;
  }

  .review-header {
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.5rem;
  }

  .review-meta {
    flex-direction: row;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
  }

  .stars {
    gap: 0.25rem;
  }

  .star {
    font-size: 1.75rem;
  }

  .home-stats {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  }

  .home-actions {
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .edit-row {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: stretch;
  }

  .save-btn {
    width: 100%;
  }
}
```

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Tune-In — Home</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/reviews.css" />
</head>
<body>
  <nav class="top-nav">
    <a href="home.html" class="nav-logo">Tune-In</a>
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a href="feed.html">Feed</a>
      <a href="search.html">Search</a>
      <a href="lists.html">Lists</a>
      <a href="queue.html">Queue</a>
      <a href="reviews.html">My Reviews</a>
      <a href="profile.html">Profile</a>
    </div>
  </nav>

  <div class="card">
    <div class="home-welcome">
      <h1>Welcome back, <span id="home-name">...</span></h1>
    </div>

    <div class="home-stats">
      <a href="follows.html?tab=followers" class="home-stat"
         onclick="sessionStorage.setItem('followsTab','followers')">
        <span class="stat-value" id="stat-followers">—</span>
        <span class="stat-label">Followers</span>
      </a>
      <a href="follows.html?tab=following" class="home-stat"
         onclick="sessionStorage.setItem('followsTab','following')">
        <span class="stat-value" id="stat-following">—</span>
        <span class="stat-label">Following</span>
      </a>
      <a href="reviews.html" class="home-stat">
        <span class="stat-value" id="stat-reviews">—</span>
        <span class="stat-label">Reviews</span>
      </a>
      <a href="queue.html" class="home-stat">
        <span class="stat-value" id="stat-queue">—</span>
        <span class="stat-label">In Queue</span>
      </a>
    </div>

    <div class="home-actions">
      <a href="review-new.html" class="action-btn">Write a Review</a>
      <a href="search.html" class="action-btn action-btn-ghost">Find Friends</a>
    </div>

    <div class="divider"></div>

    <h2 class="section-heading">Recent from Following</h2>
    <div id="feed-preview" class="reviews-list">
      <p class="empty-state">Loading...</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script type="module" src="js/home.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
```

Now create `home.js`:

---

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 4:10:44 PM)*

**✏️ Write `C:/Users/brock/OneDrive/Desktop/dig4503/midterm/js/home.js`**
```js
import { onAuthStateChanged } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.14.1/firebase-auth.js";
import { collection, query, where, getDocs, doc, getDoc } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.14.1/firebase-firestore.js";
import { auth, db } from "./firebase-config.js";

const homeNameEl   = document.getElementById("home-name");
const feedPreview  = document.getElementById("feed-preview");

const unsubscribe = onAuthStateChanged(auth, async (user) => {
  unsubscribe();

  if (!user) {
    window.location.href = "login.html";
    return;
  }

  homeNameEl.textContent = user.displayName || "there";

  await Promise.all([
    loadStats(user.uid),
    loadFeedPreview(user.uid)
  ]);
});

async function loadStats(uid) {
  try {
    const [followersSnap, followingSnap, reviewsSnap, queueSnap] = await Promise.all([
      getDocs(query(collection(db, "follows"),  where("followingId", "==", uid))),
      getDocs(query(collection(db, "follows"),  where("followerId",  "==", uid))),
      getDocs(query(collection(db, "reviews"),  where("userId",      "==", uid))),
      getDocs(query(collection(db, "queue"),    where("userId",      "==", uid)))
    ]);
    document.getElementById("stat-followers").textContent = followersSnap.size;
    document.getElementById("stat-following").textContent = followingSnap.size;
    document.getElementById("stat-reviews").textContent   = reviewsSnap.size;
    document.getElementById("stat-queue").textContent     = queueSnap.size;
  } catch (err) {
    // Leave dashes — non-critical
  }
}

async function loadFeedPreview(uid) {
  try {
    const followSnap = await getDocs(
      query(collection(db, "follows"), where("followerId", "==", uid))
    );

    if (followSnap.empty) {
      feedPreview.innerHTML = `
        <p class="empty-state">
          You're not following anyone yet.<br>
          <a href="search.html" style="color:#3dd6c8;">Find friends to follow →</a>
        </p>`;
      return;
    }

    const followingIds = followSnap.docs.map(d => d.data().followingId);

    // Chunk into groups of 10 (Firestore "in" limit)
    const chunks = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < followingIds.length; i += 10) {
      chunks.push(followingIds.slice(i, i + 10));
    }

    const snapshots = await Promise.all(
      chunks.map(chunk =>
        getDocs(query(collection(db, "reviews"), where("userId", "in", chunk)))
      )
    );

    const all = [];
    snapshots.forEach(snap => snap.forEach(d => all.push({ id: d.id, ...d.data() })));

    if (all.length === 0) {
      feedPreview.innerHTML = `<p class="empty-state">No reviews from people you follow yet.</p>`;
      return;
    }

    all.sort((a, b) => (b.createdAt?.seconds ?? 0) - (a.createdAt?.seconds ?? 0));
    const recent = all.slice(0, 5);

    // Fetch display names for authors in parallel
    const uniqueUids = [...new Set(recent.map(r => r.userId))];
    const userSnaps = await Promise.all(uniqueUids.map(id => getDoc(doc(db, "users", id))));
    const nameMap = {};
    userSnaps.forEach(snap => {
      if (snap.exists()) nameMap[snap.id] = snap.data().displayName || "Unknown";
    });

    feedPreview.innerHTML = recent.map(review => {
      const rating  = Math.min(5, Math.max(0, parseInt(review.rating) || 0));
      const author  = nameMap[review.userId] || "Unknown";
      return `
        <div class="review-card">
          <div class="review-header">
            <div>
              <div class="review-title">${escapeHtml(review.title)}</div>
              <div class="review-artist">${escapeHtml(review.artist)}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="review-meta">
              <span class="type-badge">${escapeHtml(review.type)}</span>
              <span class="review-stars">${"★".repeat(rating)}${"☆".repeat(5 - rating)}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          ${review.reviewText ? `<p class="review-text">${escapeHtml(review.reviewText)}</p>` : ""}
          <div class="review-footer">
            <a class="review-author"
               href="public-profile.html?uid=${review.userId}"
               data-uid="${review.userId}"
               onclick="sessionStorage.setItem('viewProfileUid','${review.userId}')"
               >${escapeHtml(author)}</a>
            <span class="review-date">${formatDate(review.createdAt)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>`;
    }).join("");

    if (all.length > 5) {
      feedPreview.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend",
        `<a href="feed.html" class="feed-more">View full feed →</a>`
      );
    }

  } catch (err) {
    feedPreview.innerHTML = `<p class="empty-state" style="color:#f87171;">Failed to load feed.</p>`;
  }
}

function formatDate(timestamp) {
  if (!timestamp) return "";
  const date = new Date(timestamp.seconds * 1000);
  return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { year: "numeric", month: "long", day: "numeric" });
}

function escapeHtml(str = "") {
  return str
    .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
    .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
    .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
    .replace(/"/g, "&quot;");
}
```

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Tune-In — My Profile</title>

<body>

    <a href="home.html" class="nav-logo">Tune-In</a>
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a href="feed.html">Feed</a>
      <a href="search.html">Search</a>
      <a href="lists.html">Lists</a>
      <a href="queue.html">Queue</a>
      <a href="reviews.html">My Reviews</a>
      <a href="profile.html">Profile</a>
    </div>
  </nav>

  <div class="card">
    <h1>My Profile</h1>

    <div class="stats-row">
      <a class="stat stat-link" href="follows.html?tab=followers"
         onclick="sessionStorage.setItem('followsTab','followers')">
        <span class="stat-value" id="followers-count">—</span>
        <span class="stat-label">Followers</span>
      </a>
      <a class="stat stat-link" href="follows.html?tab=following"
         onclick="sessionStorage.setItem('followsTab','following')">
        <span class="stat-value" id="following-count">—</span>
        <span class="stat-label">Following</span>
      </a>
      <a class="stat stat-link" href="queue.html">
        <span class="stat-value" id="queue-count">—</span>
        <span class="stat-label">In Queue</span>
      </a>
    </div>

    <div class="user-info">
      <div class="info-row">
        <span class="info-label">Display Name</span>
        <span class="info-value" id="display-name">—</span>
      </div>
      <div class="info-row">
        <span class="info-label">Email</span>
        <span class="info-value" id="user-email">—</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="edit-section">
      <h2>Edit Display Name</h2>
      <form id="edit-form">
        <div class="edit-row">
          <input type="text" id="edit-name" placeholder="New display name" required />
          <button type="submit" class="save-btn" id="save-btn">Save</button>
        </div>
      </form>
    </div>

    <p class="status" id="status-msg"></p>

    <button class="logout-btn" id="logout-btn">Log Out</button>
  </div>

  <script type="module" src="js/profile.js"></script>
</body>
</html>

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 4:11:33 PM)*

Everything is in place. Here's a summary of what changed:

**New files:**
- `home.html` — dashboard with stats grid, quick actions, and a 5-item feed preview
- `js/home.js` — loads stats (4 parallel queries) + recent following activity

**Navigation:**
- Every page now has a consistent fixed frosted-glass navbar: **Feed | Search | Lists | Queue | My Reviews | Profile**
- Logo everywhere links to `home.html`
- `profile.html` no longer has its own inline nav — it uses the standard top-nav
- `auth.js` redirects login/signup to `home.html` instead of `profile.html`
- Fixed inconsistencies: `lists.html` was missing "Lists", `reviews.html` had "Write a Review" instead of "My Reviews", `feed.html` was missing "Feed"

**Styling refresh:**
- Background pushed to near-black `#060c14 → #0a1929`
- Cards are now a solid `#0d1f35` — clearly visible against the dark background
- Nav is fixed, full-width, frosted glass with `backdrop-filter: blur(16px)`
- Review titles use `#f0fffe` (near-white) for stronger contrast
- Section headings are uppercased and refined
- `profile.css` is now unused — all styles live in `reviews.css`

---

**User** *(3/13/2026, 4:14:24 PM)*

I still feel like the styling is a bit bland. Do you have any suggestions on how to enegrize the design and make it look professional in quality?

---

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 4:14:54 PM)*

Here are concrete suggestions organized by impact:

---

**Highest impact (visual personality)**

1. **Better typography** — Swap Segoe UI for [Inter](https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Inter) (one Google Fonts import). It's the font behind Notion, Linear, Vercel — instantly reads as "product-quality."

2. **Gold stars** — Stars in teal blends into the rest of the UI. Changing them to amber (`#f59e0b`) creates warm/cool contrast that makes ratings pop visually and feels more natural (stars = gold is a universal expectation).

3. **Gradient brand text** — Apply a `linear-gradient` clip to the logo and `h1` headings (teal → lighter cyan). Subtle but it's the difference between "text colored teal" and "designed."

---

**Depth and polish**

4. **Card hover lift** — Add `transform: translateY(-2px)` on interactive card hover. Costs one line, makes everything feel tactile.

5. **Left accent border on review cards** — A 3px teal left border gives review cards a distinct identity instead of being plain rectangles.

6. **Background radial glow** — A faint `radial-gradient` bloom centered behind the card (deep teal, very low opacity) adds depth and breaks up the flat near-black.

---

**Refinement**

7. **Song/Album badge colors** — Give Song and Album badges different colors (e.g. teal vs indigo) so the type is scannable at a glance.

8. **Uppercase tracking on nav links** — Small caps + letter-spacing on the nav links reads more like a designed nav bar vs. plain links.

---

My recommendation: implement all of them — they're mostly CSS-only changes and together they'd make the app look genuinely portfolio-quality. Want me to go ahead?

1→import { onAuthStateChanged } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.14.1/firebase-auth.js";
     2→import {
     3→  collection, query, where, getDocs,
     4→  deleteDoc, doc, getDoc, setDoc, addDoc, serverTimestamp
     5→} from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.14.1/firebase-firestore.js";
     6→import { auth, db } from "./firebase-config.js";
     7→
     8→const reviewsList = document.getElementById("reviews-list");
     9→const listModal = document.getElementById("list-modal");
    10→const modalLists = document.getElementById("modal-lists");
    11→const modalClose = document.getElementById("modal-close");
    12→
    13→let currentUserId = null;
    14→// Map of reviewId → review data, used when adding to a list
    15→const reviewsMap = {};
    16→// Tracks which review is being added to a list
    17→let activeReviewId = null;
    18→// Cached list of user's lists — invalidated when a list is created/deleted elsewhere
    19→let cachedLists = null;
    20→
    21→// --- Auth guard ---
    22→const unsubscribe = onAuthStateChanged(auth, async (user) => {
    23→  unsubscribe();
    24→  if (!user) {
    25→    window.location.href = "login.html";
    26→    return;
    27→  }
    28→  currentUserId = user.uid;
    29→  await loadReviews(user.uid);
    30→});
    31→
    32→async function loadReviews(userId) {
    33→  try {
    34→    const q = query(collection(db, "reviews"), where("userId", "==", userId));
    35→    const snapshot = await getDocs(q);
    36→
    37→    if (snapshot.empty) {
    38→      reviewsList.innerHTML = `
    39→        <p class="empty-state">No reviews yet. <a href="review-new.html" style="color:#3dd6c8;">Write your first one.</a></p>
    40→      `;
    41→      return;
    42→    }
    43→
    44→    // Sort client-side by createdAt descending
    45→    const reviews = [];
    46→    snapshot.forEach(docSnap => reviews.push({ id: docSnap.id, ...docSnap.data() }));
    47→    reviews.sort((a, b) => (b.createdAt?.seconds ?? 0) - (a.createdAt?.seconds ?? 0));
    48→
    49→    // Cache reviews for use in the Add to List modal
    50→    reviews.forEach(r => { reviewsMap[r.id] = r; });
    51→
    52→    reviewsList.innerHTML = reviews.map(review => {
    53→      const rating = Math.min(5, Math.max(0, parseInt(review.rating) || 0));
    54→      return `
    55→        <div class="review-card" data-id="${review.id}">
    56→          <div class="review-header">
    57→            <div>
    58→              <div class="review-title">${escapeHtml(review.title)}</div>
    59→              <div class="review-artist">${escapeHtml(review.artist)}</div>
    60→            </div>
    61→            <div class="review-meta">
    62→              <span class="type-badge">${escapeHtml(review.type)}</span>
    63→              <span class="review-stars">${"★".repeat(rating)}${"☆".repeat(5 - rating)}</span>
    64→            </div>
    65→          </div>
    66→          ${review.reviewText ? `<p class="review-text">${escapeHtml(review.reviewText)}</p>` : ""}
    67→          <div class="review-footer">
    68→            <p class="review-date">${formatDate(review.createdAt)}</p>
    69→            <div class="review-actions">
    70→              <button class="add-to-list-btn" data-id="${review.id}">+ List</button>
    71→              <button class="delete-btn" data-id="${review.id}">Delete</button>
    72→            </div>
    73→          </div>
    74→        </div>
    75→      `;
    76→    }).join("");
    77→
    78→  } catch (err) {
    79→    reviewsList.innerHTML = `<p class="empty-state" style="color:#f87171;">Failed to load reviews. Please try again.</p>`;
    80→  }
    81→}
    82→

    85→  if (e.target.closest(".delete-btn")) {

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 4:19:12 PM)*

**📖 Read `C:/Users/brock/OneDrive/Desktop/dig4503/midterm/js/feed.js`**
```js
1→import { onAuthStateChanged } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.14.1/firebase-auth.js";
     2→import { collection, query, where, getDocs, doc, getDoc } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.14.1/firebase-firestore.js";
     3→import { auth, db } from "./firebase-config.js";
     4→
     5→const feedList = document.getElementById("feed-list");
     6→
     7→const unsubscribe = onAuthStateChanged(auth, async (user) => {
     8→  unsubscribe();
     9→  if (!user) {
    10→    window.location.href = "login.html";
    11→    return;
    12→  }
    13→  await loadFeed(user.uid);
    14→});
    15→
    16→async function loadFeed(uid) {
    17→  try {
    18→    // Get all users this person follows
    19→    const followsSnap = await getDocs(
    20→      query(collection(db, "follows"), where("followerId", "==", uid))
    21→    );
    22→
    23→    if (followsSnap.empty) {
    24→      feedList.innerHTML = `<p class="empty-state">Follow some users to see their reviews here.</p>`;
    25→      return;
    26→    }
    27→
    28→    const followingIds = followsSnap.docs.map(d => d.data().followingId);
    29→
    30→    // Firestore "in" supports up to 10 values — chunk the list
    31→    const chunks = [];
    32→    for (let i = 0; i < followingIds.length; i += 10) {
    33→      chunks.push(followingIds.slice(i, i + 10));
    34→    }
    35→
    36→    // Fetch reviews for all followed users in parallel
    37→    const reviewSnapshots = await Promise.all(
    38→      chunks.map(chunk =>
    39→        getDocs(query(collection(db, "reviews"), where("userId", "in", chunk)))
    40→      )
    41→    );
    42→
    43→    const reviews = [];
    44→    reviewSnapshots.forEach(snap => {
    45→      snap.forEach(docSnap => reviews.push({ id: docSnap.id, ...docSnap.data() }));
    46→    });
    47→
    48→    if (reviews.length === 0) {
    49→      feedList.innerHTML = `<p class="empty-state">No reviews from people you follow yet.</p>`;
    50→      return;
    51→    }
    52→
    53→    // Sort newest first
    54→    reviews.sort((a, b) => (b.createdAt?.seconds ?? 0) - (a.createdAt?.seconds ?? 0));
    55→
    56→    // Fetch display names for each unique author
    57→    const uniqueUserIds = [...new Set(reviews.map(r => r.userId))];
    58→    const userDocs = await Promise.all(
    59→      uniqueUserIds.map(id => getDoc(doc(db, "users", id)))
    60→    );
    61→    const nameMap = {};
    62→    userDocs.forEach(snap => {
    63→      if (snap.exists()) {
    64→        nameMap[snap.id] = snap.data().displayName || "Unknown User";
    65→      }
    66→    });
    67→
    68→    feedList.innerHTML = reviews.map(review => {
    69→      const rating = Math.min(5, Math.max(0, parseInt(review.rating) || 0));
    70→      const authorName = nameMap[review.userId] || "Unknown User";
    71→      return `
    72→        <div class="review-card">
    73→          <div class="review-header">
    74→            <div>
    75→              <div class="review-title">${escapeHtml(review.title)}</div>
    76→              <div class="review-artist">${escapeHtml(review.artist)}</div>
    77→            </div>
    78→            <div class="review-meta">
    79→              <span class="type-badge">${escapeHtml(review.type)}</span>
    80→              <span class="review-stars">${"★".repeat(rating)}${"☆".repeat(5 - rating)}</span>
    81→            </div>
    82→          </div>
    83→          ${review.reviewText ? `<p class="review-text">${escapeHtml(review.reviewText)}</p>` : ""}
    84→          <div class="review-footer">
    85→            <a class="review-author" href="public-profile.html?uid=${encodeURIComponent(review.userId)}"
    86→               data-uid="${review.userId}">${escapeHtml(authorName)}</a>
    87→            <span class="review-date">${formatDate(review.createdAt)}</span>
    88→          </div>
    89→        </div>
    90→      `;
    91→    }).join("");
    92→
    93→    // sessionStorage fallback for npx serve clean URLs
    94→    feedList.querySelectorAll(".review-author").forEach(link => {
    95→      link.addEventListener("click", () => {
    96→        sessionStorage.setItem("viewProfileUid", link.dataset.uid);
    97→      });
    98→    });
    99→
   100→  } catch (err) {
… (truncated — 118 lines total)
```

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 4:19:12 PM)*

**📖 Read `C:/Users/brock/OneDrive/Desktop/dig4503/midterm/js/queue.js`**
```js
1→import { onAuthStateChanged } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.14.1/firebase-auth.js";
     2→import {
     3→  collection, query, where, getDocs,
     4→  addDoc, deleteDoc, doc, serverTimestamp
     5→} from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.14.1/firebase-firestore.js";
     6→import { auth, db } from "./firebase-config.js";
     7→
     8→const queueForm = document.getElementById("queue-form");
     9→const queueTypeInput = document.getElementById("queue-type");
    10→const queueArtist = document.getElementById("queue-artist");
    11→const queueTitle = document.getElementById("queue-title");
    12→const titleLabel = document.getElementById("title-label");
    13→const addBtn = document.getElementById("add-btn");
    14→const statusMsg = document.getElementById("status-msg");
    15→const queueList = document.getElementById("queue-list");
    16→
    17→let currentUid = null;
    18→
    19→// --- Auth guard ---
    20→const unsubscribe = onAuthStateChanged(auth, async (user) => {
    21→  unsubscribe();
    22→  if (!user) {
    23→    window.location.href = "login.html";
    24→    return;
    25→  }
    26→  currentUid = user.uid;
    27→  await loadQueue();
    28→});
    29→
    30→// --- Type toggle ---
    31→document.querySelectorAll(".type-btn").forEach(btn => {
    32→  btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
    33→    document.querySelectorAll(".type-btn").forEach(b => b.classList.remove("active"));
    34→    btn.classList.add("active");
    35→    queueTypeInput.value = btn.dataset.type;
    36→    const isSong = btn.dataset.type === "song";
    37→    titleLabel.textContent = isSong ? "Song Title" : "Album Title";
    38→    queueTitle.placeholder = isSong ? "Song title" : "Album title";
    39→  });
    40→});
    41→
    42→// --- Add to queue ---
    43→queueForm.addEventListener("submit", async (e) => {
    44→  e.preventDefault();
    45→  if (!currentUid) return;
    46→
    47→  const artist = queueArtist.value.trim();
    48→  const title = queueTitle.value.trim();
    49→  const type = queueTypeInput.value;
    50→  if (!artist || !title) return;
    51→
    52→  addBtn.disabled = true;
    53→  addBtn.textContent = "Adding...";
    54→
    55→  try {
    56→    await addDoc(collection(db, "queue"), {
    57→      userId: currentUid,
    58→      artist,
    59→      title,
    60→      type,
    61→      addedAt: serverTimestamp()
    62→    });
    63→
    64→    queueArtist.value = "";
    65→    queueTitle.value = "";
    66→    showStatus("Added to queue.");
    67→    await loadQueue();
    68→  } catch (err) {
    69→    showStatus("Failed to add. Please try again.", true);
    70→  } finally {
    71→    addBtn.disabled = false;
    72→    addBtn.textContent = "Add to Queue";
    73→  }
    74→});
    75→
    76→// --- Load queue ---
    77→async function loadQueue() {
    78→  try {
    79→    const snap = await getDocs(
    80→      query(collection(db, "queue"), where("userId", "==", currentUid))
    81→    );
    82→
    83→    if (snap.empty) {
    84→      queueList.innerHTML = `<p class="empty-state">Your queue is empty. Add something above.</p>`;
    85→      return;
    86→    }
    87→
    88→    const items = snap.docs
    89→      .map(d => ({ id: d.id, ...d.data() }))
    90→      .sort((a, b) => (b.addedAt?.seconds ?? Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER) - (a.addedAt?.seconds ?? Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER));
    91→
    92→    queueList.innerHTML = items.map(item => `
    93→      <div class="review-card" data-id="${item.id}">
    94→        <div class="review-header">
    95→          <div>
    96→            <div class="review-title">${escapeHtml(item.title)}</div>
    97→            <div class="review-artist">${escapeHtml(item.artist)}</div>
    98→          </div>
    99→          <div class="review-meta">
   100→            <span class="type-badge">${escapeHtml(item.type)}</span>
… (truncated — 184 lines total)
```

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 4:19:12 PM)*

**📖 Read `C:/Users/brock/OneDrive/Desktop/dig4503/midterm/js/list-detail.js`**
```js
1→import { onAuthStateChanged } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.14.1/firebase-auth.js";
     2→import {
     3→  collection, query, where, getDocs,
     4→  doc, getDoc, deleteDoc
     5→} from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.14.1/firebase-firestore.js";
     6→import { auth, db } from "./firebase-config.js";
     7→
     8→const listTitle = document.getElementById("list-title");
     9→const listDesc = document.getElementById("list-desc");
    10→const itemsList = document.getElementById("items-list");
    11→
    12→// Read listId from URL query string with sessionStorage fallback
    13→const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    14→const listId = params.get("id") || sessionStorage.getItem("viewListId");
    15→sessionStorage.removeItem("viewListId");
    16→
    17→let isOwner = false;
    18→
    19→const unsubscribe = onAuthStateChanged(auth, async (user) => {
    20→  unsubscribe();
    21→  if (!user) {
    22→    window.location.href = "login.html";
    23→    return;
    24→  }
    25→
    26→  if (!listId) {
    27→    showError("No list specified.");
    28→    return;
    29→  }
    30→
    31→  await loadList(user.uid);
    32→});
    33→
    34→async function loadList(currentUid) {
    35→  try {
    36→    // Fetch the list document to get name, description, and verify ownership
    37→    const listSnap = await getDoc(doc(db, "lists", listId));
    38→
    39→    if (!listSnap.exists()) {
    40→      showError("List not found.");
    41→      return;
    42→    }
    43→
    44→    const listData = listSnap.data();
    45→    isOwner = listData.userId === currentUid;
    46→
    47→    listTitle.textContent = listData.name;
    48→    document.title = `Tune-In — ${listData.name}`;
    49→
    50→    if (listData.description) {
    51→      listDesc.textContent = listData.description;
    52→    }
    53→
    54→    await loadItems();
    55→  } catch (err) {
    56→    showError("Failed to load list. Please try again.");
    57→  }
    58→}
    59→
    60→async function loadItems() {
    61→  try {
    62→    const snap = await getDocs(
    63→      query(collection(db, "listItems"), where("listId", "==", listId))
    64→    );
    65→
    66→    if (snap.empty) {
    67→      itemsList.innerHTML = `<p class="empty-state">This list has no items yet.</p>`;
    68→      return;
    69→    }
    70→
    71→    // Sort by addedAt descending — most recently added first
    72→    const items = snap.docs
    73→      .map(d => ({ id: d.id, ...d.data() }))
    74→      .sort((a, b) => (b.addedAt?.seconds ?? Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER) - (a.addedAt?.seconds ?? Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER));
    75→
    76→    itemsList.innerHTML = items.map(item => {
    77→      const rating = Math.min(5, Math.max(0, parseInt(item.rating) || 0));
    78→      return `
    79→        <div class="review-card" data-id="${item.id}">
    80→          <div class="review-header">
    81→            <div>
    82→              <div class="review-title">${escapeHtml(item.title)}</div>
    83→              <div class="review-artist">${escapeHtml(item.artist)}</div>
    84→            </div>
    85→            <div class="review-meta">
    86→              <span class="type-badge">${escapeHtml(item.type)}</span>
    87→              <span class="review-stars">${"★".repeat(rating)}${"☆".repeat(5 - rating)}</span>
    88→            </div>
    89→          </div>
    90→          ${item.reviewText ? `<p class="review-text">${escapeHtml(item.reviewText)}</p>` : ""}
    91→          <div class="review-footer">
    92→            <p class="review-date">${formatDate(item.createdAt)}</p>
    93→            ${isOwner ? `<button class="delete-btn" data-id="${item.id}">Remove</button>` : ""}
    94→          </div>
    95→        </div>
    96→      `;
    97→    }).join("");
    98→
    99→  } catch (err) {
   100→    itemsList.innerHTML = `<p class="empty-state" style="color:#f87171;">Failed to load items. Please try again.</p>`;
… (truncated — 144 lines total)
```

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 4:21:24 PM)*

All done. Here's what changed:

**Typography**
- Inter font loaded across all three CSS files — body text will feel sharper and more product-quality

**Visual energy**
- Nav logo has a `#3dd6c8 → #a5f3fc` gradient clip — makes the brand mark feel distinct
- Background has a soft radial teal glow emanating from the top, breaking up the flat dark
- "Welcome back, [Name]" on the home page: name renders in the gradient, rest is light grey-blue
- Nav links are now uppercase with letter-spacing — reads like a designed nav, not plain links

**Stars & ratings**
- Stars changed to amber `#f59e0b` — warm/cool contrast, universal star expectation

**Badges**
- Song badge: teal (unchanged)
- Album badge: indigo `#818cf8` — instantly scannable at a glance

**Cards**
- Left teal accent border (`3px`) on all review cards — gives them a distinct identity
- Hover lift (`translateY(-2px)`) + drop shadow on review cards and list cards

**My Reviews**
- `+ Write a Review` button sits inline next to the "My Reviews" heading in the page header

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 5:04:21 PM)*

Now give the card a gradient top accent line and a subtle glow:

---

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 5:04:25 PM)*

**✏️ Edit `C:/Users/brock/OneDrive/Desktop/dig4503/midterm/css/reviews.css`**

*Remove:*
```
.card {
  background: #0d1f35;
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.18);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 2rem;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 560px;
}
```
*Insert:*
```
.card {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #0d1f35;
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.18);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 2rem;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 560px;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), 0 0 0 1px rgba(129, 140, 248, 0.05);
}

.card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  height: 2px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, #3dd6c8 30%, #818cf8 70%, transparent 100%);
}
```
> ✓ The file C:\Users\brock\OneDrive\Desktop\dig4503\midterm\css\reviews.css has been updated successfully.

*Remove:*
```
.submit-btn {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.75rem;
  background: #3dd6c8;

  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1rem;
  border: none;

  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.75rem;

  color: #060c14;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1rem;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
  transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.15s;
}

.submit-btn:hover {
  opacity: 0.88;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}
```

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 5:05:09 PM)*

Here's what changed and why each adds energy:

**Navbar**
- Height: 3.5rem → **4.5rem** with padding bumped to `0 2rem` and nav link gap widened — takes up more commanding space
- Logo: 1.15rem → **1.45rem**, extended gradient now runs teal → sky blue → **soft violet** (`#c4b5fd`)
- Added `box-shadow: 0 4px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)` — nav lifts off the page instead of floating invisibly

**Background**
- Added a **purple radial bloom** (`#818cf8` at 12% opacity) top-right, teal bloom bottom-left — the page is no longer a flat void, it has two distinct light sources creating depth
- Base darkened slightly to `#070d18` so the glows read more clearly

**Cards**
- **Gradient top accent line** (2px, teal → purple) on every card via `::before` — gives each card a distinctive glowing frame
- Added `box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)` — cards now sit elevated above the background

**Headings**
- Page `h1` now uses the same **teal → sky → violet gradient** as the logo, making every page title feel premium

**Buttons**
- Submit and action buttons replaced flat teal with a `linear-gradient(135deg, #3dd6c8 → #22d3ee)` — small but makes them feel more crafted

---

---

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 5:08:07 PM)*

Found four issues:

1. **`.home-welcome h1` color broken** — `.card h1` sets `-webkit-text-fill-color: transparent` on all `h1` children. "Welcome back," inherits that, so `color: #c8e6e3` is silently ignored. The plain text will appear as gradient instead of the intended muted white.

2. **`button` font not inheriting** — Buttons don't inherit `font-family` by default in most browsers. All buttons (type toggles, submit, save, modal) will fall back to the system serif/sans instead of Inter.

3. **`.submit-btn:hover` applies to disabled state** — No `:not(:disabled)` guard, so hovering a disabled submit button overrides the `opacity: 0.6` with `opacity: 0.88` and applies `translateY(-1px)`.

4. **`background-attachment: fixed` on mobile** — This causes the background gradients to freeze/glitch on iOS Safari, a well-known rendering bug with fixed backgrounds on mobile.

Fixing all four:

---

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 5:08:09 PM)*

**✏️ Edit `C:/Users/brock/OneDrive/Desktop/dig4503/midterm/css/reviews.css`**

*Remove:*
```
*, *::before, *::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
}
```
*Insert:*
```
*, *::before, *::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
}

button, input, textarea, select {
  font-family: inherit;
}
```
> ✓ The file C:\Users\brock\OneDrive\Desktop\dig4503\midterm\css\reviews.css has been updated successfully.

---

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 5:08:15 PM)*

**✏️ Edit `C:/Users/brock/OneDrive/Desktop/dig4503/midterm/css/reviews.css`**

*Remove:*
```
  background-attachment: fixed;
  font-family: 'Inter', 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
```
*Insert:*
```
  font-family: 'Inter', 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
```

}

}

}

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 5:08:36 PM)*

Four bugs fixed:

- **Font inheritance** — added `button, input, textarea, select { font-family: inherit; }` to the reset so Inter applies everywhere, not just body text
- **Home welcome text** — explicitly set `-webkit-text-fill-color: #c8e6e3` and `background: none` on `.home-welcome h1` to properly override the inherited gradient from `.card h1`
- **Disabled button hover** — changed `.submit-btn:hover` to `.submit-btn:hover:not(:disabled)` so the lift/opacity effect doesn't fire on a loading/disabled button
- **Mobile background** — removed `background-attachment: fixed` from all three CSS files; this property freezes the gradient on iOS Safari and causes a blank/frozen background on scroll

---

Good. Now I'll replace the entire home dashboard section in the CSS, rewrite `home.html`, and trim the one JS change — all in parallel:

---

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 5:14:31 PM)*

**✏️ Edit `C:/Users/brock/OneDrive/Desktop/dig4503/midterm/css/reviews.css`**

*Remove:*
```
/* ── Home dashboard ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.home-welcome {
  margin-bottom: 1.75rem;
}

.home-welcome h1 {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 0;
  background: none;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: #c8e6e3;
  color: #c8e6e3;
}

.home-welcome h1 span {
  background: linear-gradient(120deg, #3dd6c8 0%, #a5f3fc 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
}

.home-stats {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 0.65rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

.home-stat {
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.04);
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.14);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 0.85rem 0.75rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.2rem;
  transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
}

.home-stat:hover {
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.09);
  border-color: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.3);
}

.home-stat .stat-value {
  font-size: 1.4rem;
}

.home-stat .stat-label {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
}

.home-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.action-btn {
  flex: 1;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 0.65rem 1rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3dd6c8 0%, #22d3ee 100%);
  color: #060c14;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  border-radius: 6px;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.15s;
}

.action-btn:hover {
  opacity: 0.88;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.action-btn-ghost {
  background: transparent;
  color: #3dd6c8;
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.35);
}

.action-btn-ghost:hover {
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.07);
}

.feed-more {
  display: block;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #5eead4;
  text-decoration: none;
  margin-top: 1.25rem;
  transition: color 0.2s;
}

.feed-more:hover {
  color: #3dd6c8;
}
```
*Insert:*
```
/* ── Shared action buttons ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.action-btn {
  flex: 1;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 0.65rem 1rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3dd6c8 0%, #22d3ee 100%);
  color: #060c14;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  border-radius: 6px;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.15s;
}

.action-btn:hover {
  opacity: 0.88;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.action-btn-ghost {
  background: transparent;
  color: #3dd6c8;
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.35);
}

.action-btn-ghost:hover {
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.07);
}

/* ── Home page layout ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

body.home-page {
  display: block;
  padding: 4.5rem 0 3rem;
}

/* Hero banner */
.hero-banner {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  padding: 5rem 2rem 4.5rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.08);
}

/* Purple radial blob */
.hero-banner::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: -120px;
  right: 80px;
  width: 500px;
  height: 500px;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(129, 140, 248, 0.14) 0%, transparent 65%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

/* Concentric sonar rings */
.hero-banner::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  right: -60px;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 280px;
  height: 280px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.12);
  box-shadow:
    0 0 0 50px rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.05),
    0 0 0 100px rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.03),
    0 0 0 150px rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.015);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.hero-inner {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  max-width: 820px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.hero-eyebrow {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  color: #5eead4;
  margin-bottom: 0.85rem;
}

.hero-title {
  font-size: 3.75rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: -2px;
  line-height: 1.05;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  background: linear-gradient(120deg, #3dd6c8 0%, #a5f3fc 55%, #c4b5fd 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
}

.hero-subtitle {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: #7fc8c4;
  margin-bottom: 2.25rem;
  max-width: 440px;
  line-height: 1.65;
}

.hero-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.75rem;
}

.hero-actions .action-btn {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  padding: 0.75rem 1.75rem;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

/* Stats strip */
.stats-strip {
  padding: 2.25rem 2rem 0;
}

.stats-strip-inner {
  max-width: 820px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 0.75rem;
}

.strip-stat {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
  border: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.14);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.5rem 1.25rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
}

.strip-stat::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  height: 2px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #3dd6c8, transparent);
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
}

.strip-stat:hover {
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.07);
  border-color: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.28);
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
}

.strip-stat:hover::before {
  opacity: 1;
}

.strip-stat .stat-value {
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1;
  color: #3dd6c8;
}

.strip-stat .stat-label {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #5eead4;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em;
}

/* Feed section */
.home-feed {
  padding: 2.75rem 2rem 3rem;
}

.home-feed-inner {
  max-width: 820px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.home-feed-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

.home-feed-header .section-heading {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.feed-more-link {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #5eead4;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: color 0.15s;
}

.feed-more-link:hover {
  color: #3dd6c8;
}
```

**✏️ Write `C:/Users/brock/OneDrive/Desktop/dig4503/midterm/home.html`**
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Tune-In — Home</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/reviews.css" />
</head>
<body class="home-page">
  <nav class="top-nav">
    <a href="home.html" class="nav-logo">Tune-In</a>
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a href="feed.html">Feed</a>
      <a href="search.html">Search</a>
      <a href="lists.html">Lists</a>
      <a href="queue.html">Queue</a>
      <a href="reviews.html">My Reviews</a>
      <a href="profile.html">Profile</a>
    </div>
  </nav>

  <!-- Hero banner -->
  <section class="hero-banner">
    <div class="hero-inner">
      <p class="hero-eyebrow">Welcome back</p>
      <h1 class="hero-title" id="home-name">...</h1>
      <p class="hero-subtitle">Your music journal — track, review, and share what moves you.</p>
      <div class="hero-actions">
        <a href="review-new.html" class="action-btn">Write a Review</a>
        <a href="search.html" class="action-btn action-btn-ghost">Find Friends</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Stats strip -->
  <section class="stats-strip">
    <div class="stats-strip-inner">
      <a href="follows.html?tab=followers" class="strip-stat"
         onclick="sessionStorage.setItem('followsTab','followers')">
        <span class="stat-value" id="stat-followers">—</span>
        <span class="stat-label">Followers</span>
      </a>
      <a href="follows.html?tab=following" class="strip-stat"
         onclick="sessionStorage.setItem('followsTab','following')">
        <span class="stat-value" id="stat-following">—</span>
        <span class="stat-label">Following</span>
      </a>
      <a href="reviews.html" class="strip-stat">
        <span class="stat-value" id="stat-reviews">—</span>
        <span class="stat-label">Reviews</span>
      </a>
      <a href="queue.html" class="strip-stat">
        <span class="stat-value" id="stat-queue">—</span>
        <span class="stat-label">In Queue</span>
      </a>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Feed preview -->
  <section class="home-feed">
    <div class="home-feed-inner">
      <div class="home-feed-header">
        <h2 class="section-heading">Recent from Following</h2>
        <a href="feed.html" class="feed-more-link">View all →</a>
      </div>
      <div id="feed-preview" class="reviews-list">
        <p class="empty-state">Loading...</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <script type="module" src="js/home.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
```

---

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 5:15:21 PM)*

Here's what the home page looks like now:

**Hero banner** — Full-width, left-aligned. "WELCOME BACK" eyebrow in small caps, the user's name as a massive gradient heading (`3.75rem`), a subtitle, and two CTA buttons. The right side has two layered decorative elements: a purple radial glow bloom and concentric sonar-ring circles (CSS-only, no images). A thin gradient line separates it from the stats below.

**Stats strip** — Four cards in a grid below the hero, wider than the old card layout (`820px` max vs `560px`). Each has a hidden teal accent line that reveals on hover, a lift animation, and the stat number is significantly larger (`2rem` bold). The 4-column grid collapses to 2×2 on mobile.

**Feed section** — Full-width feed at the same `820px` max-width, with a header row showing "Recent from Following" and a permanent "View all →" link on the right. Review cards render as before with all existing styles.

The page now has genuine visual hierarchy — hero → stats → content — rather than being another card in the app's stack.

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 5:18:04 PM)*

**📖 Read `C:/Users/brock/OneDrive/Desktop/dig4503/midterm/js/home.js`**
```js
1→import { onAuthStateChanged } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.14.1/firebase-auth.js";
     2→import { collection, query, where, getDocs, doc, getDoc } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.14.1/firebase-firestore.js";
     3→import { auth, db } from "./firebase-config.js";
     4→
     5→const homeNameEl   = document.getElementById("home-name");
     6→const feedPreview  = document.getElementById("feed-preview");
     7→
     8→const unsubscribe = onAuthStateChanged(auth, async (user) => {
     9→  unsubscribe();
    10→
    11→  if (!user) {
    12→    window.location.href = "login.html";
    13→    return;
    14→  }
    15→
    16→  homeNameEl.textContent = user.displayName || "there";
    17→
    18→  await Promise.all([
    19→    loadStats(user.uid),
    20→    loadFeedPreview(user.uid)
    21→  ]);
    22→});
    23→
    24→async function loadStats(uid) {
    25→  try {
    26→    const [followersSnap, followingSnap, reviewsSnap, queueSnap] = await Promise.all([
    27→      getDocs(query(collection(db, "follows"),  where("followingId", "==", uid))),
    28→      getDocs(query(collection(db, "follows"),  where("followerId",  "==", uid))),
    29→      getDocs(query(collection(db, "reviews"),  where("userId",      "==", uid))),
    30→      getDocs(query(collection(db, "queue"),    where("userId",      "==", uid)))
    31→    ]);
    32→    document.getElementById("stat-followers").textContent = followersSnap.size;
    33→    document.getElementById("stat-following").textContent = followingSnap.size;
    34→    document.getElementById("stat-reviews").textContent   = reviewsSnap.size;
    35→    document.getElementById("stat-queue").textContent     = queueSnap.size;
    36→  } catch (err) {
    37→    // Leave dashes — non-critical
    38→  }
    39→}
    40→
    41→async function loadFeedPreview(uid) {
    42→  try {
    43→    const followSnap = await getDocs(
    44→      query(collection(db, "follows"), where("followerId", "==", uid))
    45→    );
    46→
    47→    if (followSnap.empty) {
    48→      feedPreview.innerHTML = `
    49→        <p class="empty-state">
    50→          You're not following anyone yet.<br>
    51→          <a href="search.html" style="color:#3dd6c8;">Find friends to follow →</a>
    52→        </p>`;
    53→      return;
    54→    }
    55→
    56→    const followingIds = followSnap.docs.map(d => d.data().followingId);
    57→
    58→    // Chunk into groups of 10 (Firestore "in" limit)
    59→    const chunks = [];
    60→    for (let i = 0; i < followingIds.length; i += 10) {
    61→      chunks.push(followingIds.slice(i, i + 10));
    62→    }
    63→
    64→    const snapshots = await Promise.all(
    65→      chunks.map(chunk =>
    66→        getDocs(query(collection(db, "reviews"), where("userId", "in", chunk)))
    67→      )
    68→    );
    69→
    70→    const all = [];
    71→    snapshots.forEach(snap => snap.forEach(d => all.push({ id: d.id, ...d.data() })));
    72→
    73→    if (all.length === 0) {
    74→      feedPreview.innerHTML = `<p class="empty-state">No reviews from people you follow yet.</p>`;
    75→      return;
    76→    }
    77→
    78→    all.sort((a, b) => (b.createdAt?.seconds ?? 0) - (a.createdAt?.seconds ?? 0));
    79→    const recent = all.slice(0, 5);
    80→
    81→    // Fetch display names for authors in parallel
    82→    const uniqueUids = [...new Set(recent.map(r => r.userId))];
    83→    const userSnaps = await Promise.all(uniqueUids.map(id => getDoc(doc(db, "users", id))));
    84→    const nameMap = {};
    85→    userSnaps.forEach(snap => {
    86→      if (snap.exists()) nameMap[snap.id] = snap.data().displayName || "Unknown";
    87→    });
    88→
    89→    feedPreview.innerHTML = recent.map(review => {
    90→      const rating  = Math.min(5, Math.max(0, parseInt(review.rating) || 0));
    91→      const author  = nameMap[review.userId] || "Unknown";
    92→      return `
    93→        <div class="review-card">
    94→          <div class="review-header">
    95→            <div>
    96→              <div class="review-title">${escapeHtml(review.title)}</div>
    97→              <div class="review-artist">${escapeHtml(review.artist)}</div>
    98→            </div>
    99→            <div class="review-meta">
   100→              <span class="type-badge type-${review.type}">${escapeHtml(review.type)}</span>
… (truncated — 134 lines total)
```

---

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 5:21:16 PM)*

Here's the full analysis:

**One real bug — `auth.css` missing the font-family reset**
The `button { font-family: inherit }` fix was added to `reviews.css` but not to `auth.css`. The login/signup page uses `auth.css` exclusively, so its submit button still falls back to the browser's system font instead of Inter.

**One redundancy — `body.home-page` padding-top in the 480px breakpoint**
`body.home-page { padding: 4.5rem 0 3rem }` already sets padding-top to 4.5rem. The 480px breakpoint adds `body.home-page { padding-top: 4.5rem }` which reasserts an identical value — harmless but dead code.

**Everything else checks out:**
- `hero-banner` has `position: relative` so `::before`/`::after` decorative elements are correctly scoped to the banner, not the viewport
- `hero-inner { z-index: 1 }` correctly layers content above the blobs
- `body.home-page { display: block }` correctly disables the flex centering without breaking `min-height: 100vh`
- `.hero-actions .action-btn { flex: 0 0 auto }` correctly overrides the base `flex: 1` so buttons don't stretch
- The three breakpoints (700px → 600px → 480px) cascade correctly with no specificity conflicts
- `strip-stat::before` accent line is correctly positioned with `position: relative` on the parent

Fixing both:

---

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 5:21:18 PM)*

**✏️ Edit `C:/Users/brock/OneDrive/Desktop/dig4503/midterm/css/auth.css`**

*Remove:*
```
*, *::before, *::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
}
```
*Insert:*
```
*, *::before, *::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
}

button, input, textarea, select {
  font-family: inherit;
}
```

The two fixes from the last review are in place — `auth.css` has the font-family reset, and the redundant padding-top rule is removed from the 480px breakpoint.

The app is in a solid state:
- Consistent navbar across all pages (Feed | Search | Lists | Queue | My Reviews | Profile)
- `home.html` as the post-login hub with hero banner, stats strip, and feed preview
- Unified stylesheet (`reviews.css`) covering all pages including profile
- Type badges (album/song) with distinct colors
- Gold stars, gradient logo text, card hover lift
- Auth flow redirecting to `home.html` on login/signup

.top-nav {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;

  height: 4.5rem;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0 2rem;

    100deg,
    rgba(30, 20, 60, 0.97) 0%,
    rgba(10, 18, 40, 0.97) 50%,
    rgba(5, 22, 30, 0.97) 100%
  );
  backdrop-filter: blur(20px);

  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.18);

}

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 5:35:57 PM)*

**✏️ Edit `C:/Users/brock/OneDrive/Desktop/dig4503/midterm/css/reviews.css`**

*Remove:*

*Insert:*
```
.nav-links a {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em;
  color: #7fc8c4;
  text-decoration: none;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem;
  border-radius: 5px;
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
}

.nav-links a:hover {
  color: #3dd6c8;
  background: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.08);
  border-color: rgba(61, 214, 200, 0.22);
}
```

**Claude** *(3/13/2026, 5:36:03 PM)*

Two changes applied:

- **Navbar background** — switched from flat near-black to a `100deg` gradient: deep indigo-violet on the left bleeding into navy in the center and dark teal-black on the right. This creates clear visual separation from the page's radial gradient, and the bottom border opacity was bumped slightly (`0.12 → 0.18`) to reinforce the edge
- **Nav link hover** — links now get a teal pill background + faint teal border on hover, making the interactive state immediately obvious without being heavy-handed. The padding was tightened so the pill hugs the text

    11→// --- Tab switching ---

    15→const signupForm = document.getElementById("signup-form");
    16→
    17→loginTab.addEventListener("click", () => {
    18→  loginTab.classList.add("active");
    19→  signupTab.classList.remove("active");
    20→  loginForm.classList.remove("hidden");
    21→  signupForm.classList.add("hidden");
    22→  // Disable hidden form inputs so browser validation ignores them
    23→  signupForm.querySelectorAll("input").forEach(i => i.disabled = true);
    24→  loginForm.querySelectorAll("input").forEach(i => i.disabled = false);
    25→  clearError();
    26→});
    27→
    28→signupTab.addEventListener("click", () => {
    29→  signupTab.classList.add("active");
    30→  loginTab.classList.remove("active");
    31→  signupForm.classList.remove("hidden");
    32→  loginForm.classList.add("hidden");
    33→  loginForm.querySelectorAll("input").forEach(i => i.disabled = true);
    34→  signupForm.querySelectorAll("input").forEach(i => i.disabled = false);
    35→  clearError();
    36→});
    37→
    38→// Flag to prevent onAuthStateChanged from racing with form submission redirects
    39→let isSubmitting = false;
    40→
    41→// --- Sign Up ---
    42→signupForm.addEventListener("submit", async (e) => {
    43→  e.preventDefault();

    58→    await setDoc(doc(db, "users", user.uid), {
    59→      uid: user.uid,
    60→      displayName,
    61→      displayNameLower: displayName.toLowerCase(),
    62→      email,
    63→      createdAt: serverTimestamp()
    64→    });
    65→    window.location.href = "home.html";
    66→  } catch (err) {
    67→    // If Auth user was created but a later step failed, delete the partial account
    68→    if (user) await user.delete().catch(() => {});
    69→    isSubmitting = false;
    70→    submitBtn.disabled = false;
    71→    submitBtn.textContent = "Create Account";
    72→    showError(friendlyError(err.code));
    73→  }
    74→});
    75→

    81→  const password = document.getElementById("login-password").value;
    82→
    83→  try {
    84→    await signInWithEmailAndPassword(auth, email, password);
    85→    window.location.href = "home.html";
    86→  } catch (err) {
    87→    isSubmitting = false;
    88→    showError(friendlyError(err.code));
    89→  }
    90→});
    91→
    92→// --- Redirect if already logged in ---
    93→// Only fires when the page loads with an existing session, not during form submissions
    94→onAuthStateChanged(auth, (user) => {
    95→  if (user && !isSubmitting) window.location.href = "home.html";
    96→});
